# init(_:)

**Initializer**

Convert Attributes to CreationAttributes. This init will fail if [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelBufferCreationAttributes/pixelFormatType] or [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelBufferCreationAttributes/size] properties are absent.

## Declaration

```swift
init?(_ attributes: CVPixelBufferAttributes)
```
title: init(_:)
